# Universal Appliances Repair

Universal Appliances Repair Group Inc. provides appliance repair services in Orange County, California.

Website: https://fixappliancesfast.com/
Phone: (949) 629-5365
Email: info@fixappliancesfast.com
Address: 10832 Asbury Avenue, Stanton, CA 90680

## Services

- Refrigerator repair
- Washer repair
- Dryer repair
- Dishwasher repair
- Oven repair
- Stove repair
- Freezer repair
- Garbage disposal repair
- Microwave repair
- Wine cooler repair

## Service area

Orange County, CA, including Stanton, Irvine, Anaheim, Santa Ana, Huntington Beach,
Costa Mesa, Fullerton, Garden Grove, Tustin, Orange, Lake Forest, Mission Viejo,
Newport Beach, Brea, Yorba Linda, Westminster, Seal Beach, Dana Point, Laguna Beach,
Laguna Niguel, Buena Park, Los Alamitos, Rancho Santa Margarita, and Fountain Valley.

We also serve nearby Los Angeles County (Gateway Cities): Pico Rivera, Whittier,
Downey, Long Beach, Montebello, Santa Fe Springs, and Norwalk. Orange County remains our
primary service area.

## Repair Cost Guide

Typical repair cost ranges for Orange County appliances (refrigerators, washers, dryers, dishwashers, ovens):
https://fixappliancesfast.com/pages/appliance-repair-cost-orange-county.html

## Booking

https://fixappliancesfast.com/pages/contact.html

## About

Family-owned and operated. Licensed, bonded, and insured. Same-day service available
in Orange County, CA. Warranty on all repairs — parts and labor.

## Pricing & Discounts

Diagnostic fee: $99 per visit. Applied toward the repair if the customer approves. If the customer does not proceed, the $99 covers the visit only.

Multi-unit visits: First unit $99, each additional unit on the same visit $49.

30-day deposit: If a customer pays the $99 diagnostic fee and books the repair within 30 days, the $99 credits as a deposit on the repair estimate.

Discount: 20% off labor for repeat customers and seniors aged 60 and over. Cannot be combined with other promotions.

Estimates vary by brand, part availability, and diagnosis. A final quote is provided before any repair work begins.
